productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Adizero Black Sports Shoes
description: Blink and you're beat. Derrick Rose has one of the quickest first steps in the league, and the adidas AdiZero Rose Basketball shoes are one reason why. An ultra-lightweight Sprintskin upper with air mesh windows keeps them light and breathable, while a Puremotion sole keeps them quick and responsive. Upper Synthetic leather upper for maximum durability and lightweight comfort adidas patented 3-Stripe overlays on the sides in synthetic leather on the midfoot region for enhanced support Sprintskin material on sides of shoe provides breathability, support, and reduces weight High ankle for snug support to the lower leg with Geofit collar which acts as a brace for the ankle Synthetic overlay at the back heel for enhanced backfoot protection and support Perforations on the forefoot, heel and midfoot for ventilation Meshed, padded tongue and collar for absolute breathable and snug comfort Lace-up system for a snug, customised Fit Midsole PU for absolute lightweight comfort and impact protection Sprint Frame extends under the food to provide a Torsion system in the midfoot to support the inner arch and improve forefoot motion control in both linear and lateral movement Outsole Durable non-marking Puremotion outsole with circular patterned grooves and herringbone grooves on the forefoot and heel for absolute grip and traction Horizontal wave-like grooves on the medial forefoot and lateral heel for enhanced ease of movement and stability Shoe care Wipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dirt Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
